title: koeleria spicata subsp. hultenii
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. hultenii, also known as a subspecies of Koeleria spicata, is a type of perennial grass native to the Arctic tundra and subarctic regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. hultenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
